data.content: Plan review approved. Plan is complete, correct, and feasible. All 6 acceptance criteria are covered. Key risks (async defaultProfileId vs restored drafts, relationship state outside react-hook-form, storage lifecycle across Done/Create More/dismissal) are correctly identified with clear mitigation strategies. localStorage approach follows existing codebase patterns (beat-table-expand.tsx, app-store.ts). Test strategy is pragmatic given the repo's test harness. No invariant violations. Ready for implementation.
